positive: A minimalist, highly stylized geometric pattern featuring interconnected abstract cosmic shapes (stars, nebulae, crescent moons) forming a cohesive, symmetrical design. The color palette is deep indigo, electric cyan, and radiant gold, set against a matte black background. Use linework and bold color blocks to emphasize clean silhouettes and strong contrast. The composition must be perfectly centered and repeatable, designed to look stunning as an all-over apparel print. High contrast, graphic novel style, vector art quality, pop art influence, ethereal, cosmic horror aesthetic, octane render, UHD, highly detailed.
